title: epigynum odoratum
intro: Epigynum odoratum, a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia, is also known as the "sweet tea tree" due to its fragrant flowers and leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Epigynum odoratum are believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, with the leaves and flowers being dried and used as a herbal remedy.
